findings.rationale: Workflow YAML is well-structured. Policy evaluation logic correctly implements thresholds from default.yaml. Error handling covers schema validation, JSON parse, and generic exceptions.
Token handling is correct — app token passed via env, not inline. GITHUB_TOKEN fallback uses standard permissions. tibdex/github-app-token pinned to SHA. No secrets exposed in outputs.
Validation logic handles edge cases: empty emission list, missing fields, invalid JSON. Block/approve/comment paths are distinct. Manual end-to-end test required after merge.
